DSBLTY_DFCLTY_CNCNTRTNG_IND_09 

DSBLTY_DFCLTY_CNCNTRTNG_IND_10 

DSBLTY_DFCLTY_CNCNTRTNG_IND_11 

DSBLTY_DFCLTY_CNCNTRTNG_IND_12 

LABEL: Disability Indicator — Difficulty Concentrating ― January–December (01―12) 

DESCRIPTION: A monthly flag to indicate whether the beneficiary is five years old or older and has serious difficulty 
concentrating, remembering, or making decisions because of a physical, mental, or emotional 
condition. There are separate variables for each of the 12 months
